steps.title: Recognize the pattern
steps.content:
The outputs are cubes of the inputs:
$$
0^3=0,\quad 1^3=1,\quad 2^3=8,\quad 3^3=27
$$
So the graph should match $y=x^3$.

steps.title: Choose the matching graph
steps.content: The matching graph passes through those four points and rises like a cubic curve. The answer is B.
